chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Admonition Regarding Women

text: 4379 - رَوَى سَمَاعَةُ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "اِتَّقُوا اَللَّهَ فِي اَلضَّعِيفَيْنِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4379 - Sama'ah narrated from Abu Abdillah (as) who said: "Fear Allah (swt) regarding the two weak ones."
